summary: An Iranian Hermes 900 drone launched an air-to-ground missile at a Basij militia gathering in Tehran, with a bus passing nearby. Ukrainian FPV units on the Zaporizhzhia front destroyed multiple Russian drones, including 9 Domaha, 4 Darts, and others. A pro-Iranian group in Iraq flew a fiber-optic FPV drone over the U.S. Embassy in Baghdad, likely using Russian-acquired tactics. In Donetsk, Ukrainian forces reportedly killed WarGonzo co-founder Evgeny Nikolayev with an FPV strike. Russian "Elka" and "Yolka" anti-aircraft drones continued kinetic intercepts of Ukrainian UAVs, with operators noted for clear communication. Ukrainian forces destroyed a Russian MT-LB with paratroopers and motorcycles attempting a breakthrough near Sloviansk. Russian "Molniya" drones targeted Ukrainian UAV control points in Sumy region, with operators chasing survivors using FPV drones. Ukrainian FPV pilots employed tactics like dismounting Russian riders and striking hidden infantry, including a case of a Russian soldier charging a drone with a bayonet and losing.
